Buena Gente Cuban Bakery
Menu
ABOUT US
Established in 2016 in Atlanta, GA as a “rolling
ventanita
”, Buena Gente Cuban Bakery specializes in traditional and authentic Cuban delights. Buena Gente (hen-teh) means good people. It is a celebration of our culture and a mission to preserve the flavors we grew up on in Miami, FL.
In August 2020 we realized our dream of
opening a brick and mortar bakery
. Follow your nose to our shop and you’ll find freshly baked pastelitos bursting with the tropical flavor of our signature guava preserves; handmade empanadas, croquetas, and
Cuban sandwiches
crafted with
lechon
marinated in our own mojo, then pressed on freshly baked Cuban bread. All of our desserts, like arroz con leche and tres leches cake, are lovingly made in small batches. Be sure to grab a Cuban coffee with hand spun
espumita
for a pick me up that pairs well with everything!
HOT OFF THE PRESS!
LOCATION & HOURS
1365 Clairmont Rd.
Decatur, GA 30033
OPEN
Thursday: 8AM-2PM
Friday: 8AM-2PM
Saturday: 9AM-2PM
Sunday: 9AM-2PM
Sandwiches served at 11AM
CLOSED
Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday
